body: Received 47 support tickets in last 24 hours related to database timeouts. Issue detected at 14:30 UTC on 2026-01-29. Root cause: connection pool exhaustion under load. Fix deployed at 16:45 UTC. Recovery time: 2.25 hours. Customer impact: ~500 users affected during outage window.
title: Support ticket spike - Database connection issues
